subcodes.first_line: O faithful companion! For some time there hath been a delay in correspondence, and this is a wisdom from the All-Powerful Lord. Now that I take up the pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار باوفا چندیست که در تحریر تاخیر شد و این حکمتی از رب قدیر حال که بنگارش
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @growth of the Cause, @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
